subject: [PATCH v2 1/4] sunrpc: add per-netns per-procedure call counts to svc_stat

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds per-network namespace (netns) and per-procedure call counts to the svc_stat structure in the Linux kernel's sunrpc module. The existing global call count arrays are not network-namespace-aware, so this change allows for namespace-scoped statistics to be returned through an upcoming netlink stats interface. The patch introduces a new vs_count pointer array in struct svc_stat and adds helper functions to manage per-version percpu call count arrays. It also updates the nfsd_net_init and nfsd_net_exit functions to allocate and free these counts as needed.
